did_this_paper_use_ai_to_obtain_results_.details: The paper is a survey/review article that discusses and compares existing AI methods (such as ANN, CNN, SVM, GAN) for skin cancer detection. It does not present original experimental results obtained by applying these AI methods; rather, it summarizes findings from other studies.

non_compliance_reason: The paper does not use AI to obtain results in dermatology.
